commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can harden reserved-ID validation and add the missing regression tests; maintainer compatibility acceptance is still needed afterward.; Needs attention: The diff does not add new third-party code execution, but the new registry filter weakens health-check boundary enforcement for policy/security diagnostics.; Review finding: [P1] Validate reserved health IDs before filtering core kin... commands.review_summary:
The PR moves core doctor lint checks to ordered doctor contributions, appends extension registry checks after them, adds inline contribution health-check support, removes the conversion-plan ledger, and updates related docs/tests.

PR surface: Source -90, Tests +576, Docs +2. Total +488 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows the failing path: `src/flows/health-check-registry.ts:34` filters `kind: "core"` registered checks before the reserved-ID validation at lines 35-38, and the added tests cover only `kind: "plugin"` collisions.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can harden reserved-ID validation and add the missing regression tests; maintainer compatibility acceptance is still needed afterward.
